offer: For construction contractors processing 5–15 work orders/month, inefficient scheduling causes late maintenance visits. We automate scheduling instead of manual scheduling and paper work orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling
Direct message 20-50 contractors with demo video
Participate in forums for construction tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of work orders and calendar view for scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
